content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — release_notes.txt calls the release a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), signaling an unfinished build to App Store users.
Pierre: Apple's review team treats explicit "beta"/"testing" language in store-facing copy as a signal the build isn't ready for public release, which can trigger a rejection under 2.2. Here the release notes openly invite users to expect bugs and report breakage — replace this with production-ready release notes describing what changed, and reserve beta language for TestFlight-only builds.
